mvw.mvw_command: cargo build -p tracing -p tracing-core -p tracing-subscriber --tests --jobs 1 && cargo test -p tracing -p tracing-core -p tracing-subscriber --lib --tests --jobs 1 -- --test-threads=1
mvw.input_scale: tracing 核心链路（tracing + tracing-core + tracing-subscriber）单 job 构建 + lib/tests（排除doc tests）+ 单线程测试

environment.methodology: tutorial.md one-pass profiling; process-tree RSS peak (monitor_tree.sh), whole tree not single process; MVW actually run; multi-thread/multi-process peak included.

static_triage.notes: Rust tracing 核心链路（instrumentation + core + subscriber）；无 GPU 依赖；构建/测试主要消耗 CPU、RAM、Disk。

peaks_observed.cpu_utilization_summary: build moderate-high (core crates compilation), run moderate-high (core crates tests)

min_hardware.summary: 2 vCPU / 2 GB RAM / 2 GB disk, no GPU. Raw process-tree peaks: build 0.4624 GB, run 0.0506 GB, disk 1.1885 GB.
